sources.title: Judaai 1997 Hindi 720p Dv DRip X 264 AC 3 5.1... Hon 3y

metadata.Plot: Kaajal marries Ravi an engineer thinking he is wealthy and earns lot under the table.But finds that Ravi is a simple and honest guy.Kaajal then creates a world of her own luxuries like how rich people live and lusts behind money.Jhanvi niece of Ravi's boss arrives from abroad and falls deeply in love with Ravi knowing that he is married with two kids.When Jhanvi's attempts fail to attract Ravi she lures Kaajal with money that she will give her a Crore if she allows her husband to marry her.After the marriage Kaajal lust becomes more and forgets her family while Jhanvi takes care of the family.
